title: Forthglade Meaty Sausages (4 x 100g Bags) - Hypoallergenic & Grain Free Natural Dog Treats, Pork with Venison, Natural Dog Treats with 65% Meat, Resealable Bags
features: PORK AND VENISON DOG SAUSAGES: Super indulgent hypoallergenic dog treats with an irresistible taste and texture, made with 65 percent pork and venison and approved by sausage dogs, for all dogs

GRAIN FREE NATURAL TREATS: Each lip-licking good sausage is gently air-baked, 100 percent natural, packed with fruit, free from junk or fillers, making them perfect for even the most sensitive tummies
IRRESISTIBLE TASTE: These tail-waggingly, snap-it-out-of-you-hand Forthglade dog treats are ideal for helping you nourish the relationship between you and your four-legged friend in between mealtimes
4 x 100G: Suitable for dogs aged 2 months+ to senior and each of the healthy dog treats can easily be broken in two for small dogs and puppies, box and bags are 100% recyclable
B CORP: With our B Corp Certification, we’re committed to a future of making positive pawprints on our planet, people and pooches

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎Store in a cool, dry place. Pack is resealable to maintain freshness. Once opened, consume within two weeks​
